ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "place_of_publication" TEXT /* Place of publication (e.g., conference name, journal name) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., Conference Papers, Articles) */,
  "links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of links to the publication (e.g., PDF, DOI) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of keywords for easy search */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., Published, Accepted, Submitted) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number for the publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number for the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "page_range" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the author is affiliated with */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the author's research interests */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "research_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the parent research area (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the research area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the research area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_areas_parent_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_research_areas" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, editor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the publication */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the publication (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "publication_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., PDF, DOI, URL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_links_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the institution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the institution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_institutions" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number for the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the journal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the journal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_journals" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the conference's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the conference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the conference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_conferences" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the publication */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "conference_id")
)
